subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses to retrieve current contracted Adobe licenses by product line, including contract end dates, seat counts, and pricing terms
Query consumption_facts for Q4 2024 actual Adobe spend by product line and calculate 90-day usage trend (consumption rate, growth trajectory)

Reconcile contracted state (sam_licenses) with Q4 spend and usage trends (consumption_facts). Classify each product line by renewal posture (expand, hold, reduce), calculate coverage gaps, and generate spend trajectory and recommendation for each product line

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks, minimum necessary: (1) mongo_query (small) for current contracted state from sam_licenses — straightforward license document retrieval; (2) sql_gen (mid) for Q4 spend and 90-day trend computation from consumption_facts — requires aggregation and time-series window functions across a single data warehouse; (3) cross_recon (frontier) to reconcile two sources (MongoDB contracts + SQL spend/usage), classify renewal posture by product line, and generate strategic recommendations. The cross_recon tier is frontier because it must synthesize heterogeneous signals (contract terms, spend actuals, usage trends), compute coverage ratios, and generate multi-signal classification and trajectory decisions — this requires high reasoning capability to avoid misclassifying renewal strategy.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as q4_2024_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_date) as active_days, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) as avg_daily_seats, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as total_seat_days, ROUND(SUM(cf.amount_usd)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_date), 0), 2) as daily_consumption_rate, ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-11-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-12-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END))::NUMERIC / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-11-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 2) as growth_trajectory_pct FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Adobe' AND cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' AND cf.fiscal_quarter = 4 AND cf.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY cf.product ORDER BY q4_2024_spend DESC
